description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features three seat cushions and three back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size, providing a clean and structured look. Two accent pillows, one in a light color and the other in a blue tone, are placed at either end, while a blue throw blanket is draped over one armrest and partially onto the seat. The armrests are straight, slim, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's contemporary aesthetic. The legs are thin, metallic, and positioned at the corners, elevating the sofa slightly off the ground and giving it a light, airy appearance. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or tufting, emphasizing a sleek and understated style.
description: A modern, light gray three-seater sofa with slim metallic legs, straight armrests, and smooth upholstery, accented by blue and light-colored pillows and a blue throw.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two accent pillows, and a blue throw on the right armrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, straight armrest, and the blue throw draped over the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the blue throw partially visible over the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the straight armrest and the arrangement of cushions and pillows from the left.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, with two accent pillows and a throw blanket; cushions are not attached and are evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, slim armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a minimalist rectangular profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four thin, metallic legs positioned at the corners, straight and exposed, providing a modern and elevated appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at medium height, matching the armrest height, with three loose back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
